starter.name: Starter

features.tooltip: Customers get a lock screen notification every time they earn a stamp, reach a milestone, or unlock a reward. Works via Apple Wallet and Google Wallet — no app needed.

growth.name: Growth
growth.tagline: For businesses ready to scale their customer relationships

features.tooltip: Send promotional notifications to all your customers. Announce new products, happy hours, or seasonal offers — directly in their wallet.
See visit frequency, peak hours, retention rates, and customer trends. Identify your best customers and spot those at risk of leaving.
Add multiple business addresses. Each location can scan and stamp independently. Track analytics per location.
Customers get notified when they're near your location — 'You're 2 stamps away from a free coffee!' Available on Apple Wallet.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our pricing.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes! Every plan starts with 3 months free as part of our Founding Partner program. No credit card required to get started.

items.question: Can I switch plans later?
items.answer: Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. When you upgrade, you get immediate access to the new features. When you downgrade, the change takes effect at the end of your current billing cycle.

items.question: Are there per-customer charges?
items.answer: No. Every plan includes unlimited customers and unlimited scans. Your price stays the same whether you have 10 customers or 10,000.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) as well as SEPA direct debit for European businesses.

items.question: When will the Pro plan be available?
items.answer: The Pro plan is currently in development. We're building multi-location support, geofencing, and advanced segmentation. Join the waitlist to be notified when it launches.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. There are no contracts or cancellation fees. Cancel anytime and you'll keep access until the end of your current billing period.

items.question: What is the Founding Partner program?
items.answer: Our Founding Partner program gives early adopters 50% off their plan — locked for life. You also get 3 months completely free to test the platform. Spots are limited.

cta2.title: Ready to get started?
cta2.subtitle: Join the businesses building customer loyalty with Stampeo.
